untranslatable_reason: Signal requires direct measurement of implied volatility (IV) and vega exposure on option spreads. Available indicators lack: (1) implied volatility data, (2) option Greeks (vega, gamma, theta), (3) spread position Greeks. India_vix used as volatility proxy, but cannot measure vega differential between long and short call legs or confirm net positive vega structure required by the rule.
translation_notes: MCMILLAN_DRY_354 is an options strategy rule dependent on IV changes and vega exposure. The signal fundamentally requires options pricing data and Greeks not available in the price/technical indicator set. Attempted approximation using india_vix as volatility proxy for entry/exit, but this does NOT capture the core logic: the relative vega between spread legs. For proper implementation, a dedicated options analytics layer would be needed.
